facebook.caption: If you're looking for a beachfront stay that balances elegance with genuine comfort, Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island deserves a serious look. Sitting right on the beach in Cửa Lấp, this refined resort earns its 4.8/5 rating across over 2,500 reviews with good reason. Guests have access to three on-site restaurants, a full spa, a stunning outdoor pool, and a cocktail lounge for those golden-hour evenings. Practical tip: book a sea-view room and head to the lounge just before sunset. You'll thank yourself.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun sink into the South China Sea from the cocktail lounge at Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island. Three restaurants, a serene spa, and that outdoor pool make it easy to never want to leave. Rated 4.8/5 by more than 2,500 guests, this one lives up to the hype.

instagram.caption: Beachfront elegance in Cửa Lấp. Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island brings together three restaurants, a spa, an outdoor pool, and a cocktail lounge in one beautifully designed package. Rated 4.8/5 by 2,500+ guests. Pro tip: time your arrival for sunset.
instagram.video_caption: Pool, spa, cocktails, and a beach right outside your door. Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island is giving resort vacation done right. Rated 4.8/5 for a reason.

tiktok.caption: This beachfront resort in Phu Quoc is rated 4.8/5 for a reason. Pool, spa, 3 restaurants, cocktail lounge. Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island might ruin other hotels for you. #PhuQuoc #SalindaResort #VietnamTravel #BeachResort
